name: cannyforge/archive
description: CannyForge Archive — combined HTML sitemap + JS archive and a crawl-budget-friendly pagination replacement for WordPress.

scripts-descriptions.i18n: Generate languages/cannyforge-archive.pot via WP-CLI (run before each release so translators have current strings)
scripts-descriptions.dist: Build the distributable plugin folder and ZIP archive
scripts-descriptions.install:local: Build, zip, and install the plugin into the local WordPress site at /var/www/html
scripts-descriptions.seed:historic: Seed the local WordPress site with older posts for archive smoke testing
scripts-descriptions.stan: PHPStan static analysis (high level + dead-code + WP stubs)
scripts-descriptions.rector: Rector dead-code set, dry-run (zero changes expected)
scripts-descriptions.deptrac: Deptrac layer-dependency rules (Core cannot depend on Bootstrap)
scripts-descriptions.mess: PHPMD — the REAL god-class budget: per-method cyclomatic/length + class size, HARD-FAILS
scripts-descriptions.insights: PHP Insights — advisory architecture/quality scores only (NOT a gate; PHPMD owns complexity, PHPCS owns style)
scripts-descriptions.infection: Mutation testing merge gate (CI uses PCOV; requires a coverage driver locally)
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Real-WordPress integration suite (ticket 603): builds dist/, boots a disposable wp-env WordPress, and runs tests/WpIntegration against it. Needs Docker + Node.
scripts-descriptions.qa: Full quality suite — the merge gate; Infection is a required CI mutation gate
